summary: Frontend-only dark mode visual testing. Verified all 8 dark mode fixes requested. All tests PASS - primary buttons are blue in dark mode, form inputs are dark, Products sub-tabs active state is dark (not white), dark mode persistence works, light mode regression is clean.

design_issues.screen: Create Customer modal - Partner Organization select
issues: 'Select partner org...' dropdown trigger computed bg=rgba(0,0,0,0) transparent, but visually appears dark due to parent dark background. This is acceptable/not a real bug.

test_1_dark_mode_primary_buttons_blue.details: Create Customer button bg=rgb(80, 144, 247) = blue in dark mode. --primary CSS var = '217 91% 64%' resolves to rgb(80, 144, 247). New Product button also blue (visible in screenshot). Previously was white (210 40% 90%).

test_2_form_inputs_dark_in_modal.details: All modal inputs: bg=rgb(28, 33, 40) (--aa-card dark). Country select: bg=rgb(22, 27, 34). All text=rgb(230, 237, 243) (--aa-text light). No white backgrounds in any input field.

test_3_admin_panel_overall_dark.details: Body bg=rgb(13, 17, 23), sidebar dark, table backgrounds dark, stat cards dark, badges semantic colors (green=active, red=danger). Screenshots confirm full dark theme.

test_4_products_subtabs_active_not_white.details: Active 'Products' tab bg=rgb(22, 27, 34) (dark card color, NOT white). Inactive tabs: rgba(0,0,0,0) transparent. TabsList background is dark.

test_5_dark_mode_persistence.details: localStorage key 'aa_dark_mode'='true' persists. After page.reload(), html.aa-dark class is still present. Dark mode survives full page reload.

test_6_light_mode_regression.details: --primary in light='222 47% 11%' (dark navy). Create Customer btn bg=rgb(15,23,41) dark navy. Modal inputs bg=rgb(255,255,255) white. Body bg=rgb(248,250,252) light grey. All correct.

test_7_export_import_csv_dark_visible.details: Export CSV: bg=transparent, color=rgb(230,237,243) light text, border=rgb(40,49,62) dark border. Buttons clearly visible in dark mode with proper outline style.

test_8_sidebar_navigation_contrast.details: Sidebar nav items visible with proper contrast. Active items have blue accent (--aa-accent). Section headers (PLATFORM, PEOPLE, COMMERCE, CONTENT, SETTINGS, INTEGRATIONS) visible.

critical_code_review_comments: index.css dark mode: --primary changed from '210 40% 90%' (very light) to '217 91% 64%' (accent blue) - fix confirmed working

UniversalFormRenderer.tsx pillInput/pillSelect/pillTextarea: now use CSS vars (--aa-card, --aa-text, --aa-border, --aa-muted, --aa-accent, --aa-surface) instead of hardcoded bg-white/90 - fix confirmed working
AddressFieldRenderer.tsx: same CSS var approach - fix confirmed working
bg-white/90, bg-white/60, bg-white/80 opacity modifier classes now overridden in .aa-dark - fix confirmed working

Minor: ProductEditor sticky header (.aa-dark .sticky.top-0.bg-white and .aa-dark .border-b.border-slate-200.bg-white) have CSS overrides in index.css - not tested in this iteration but code review shows it's in place
context_for_next_testing_agent: All dark mode fixes verified working: (1) --primary in dark mode = '217 91% 64%' = rgb(80,144,247) blue, buttons are blue not white; (2) Form inputs in Create Customer modal all have dark bg=rgb(28,33,40) in dark mode; (3) Products sub-tabs active state = dark rgb(22,27,34), not white; (4) Dark mode persists via localStorage 'aa_dark_mode'='true'; (5) Light mode regression clean - dark navy buttons, white inputs. CSS vars working correctly via bg-[var(--aa-card)] in UniversalFormRenderer.tsx and AddressFieldRenderer.tsx. bg-white/90 Tailwind opacity modifier override added in index.css lines 592-598.
mocked_apis: Resend Email - email sending is mocked/not actually sending
